diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createFactory, createMiddleware, Factory, InitApp, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper, src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for Hono with handler combination utilities (1-10 handlers), runtime options, and app initialization via initApp hook.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request, src/types, src/utils/uses url utilities
+- Safe summary: Route helper providing matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, and basePath functions for examining routing tree structure.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/uses http-status utilities
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with WSEvents (onOpen/onMessage/onClose/onError), WSContext implementation for sending/closing messages.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/uses cookie utilities
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper with get/set/delete operations supporting regular and signed cookies with __Secure- and __Host- prefixes.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/hono, src/types
+- Safe summary: Testing client wrapper that creates a test Client instance from a Hono app using custom fetch.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime
+- Reads as: (self exports), no external imports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper providing env() access to environment bindings based on runtime (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light).
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/uses html helper, src/jsx, src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with css() (template strings), cx() (class merging), keyframes() (animations), viewTransition() (CSS transitions).
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, rawCssString, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID
+- Reads as: (self exports)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utility helper with buildStyleString, minify, and common template functions for class/style generation.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, HTTPException
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/uses headers utilities
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper implementing Fetch API wrapper with header handling and RFC 9110 compliance (hop-by-hop header removal).
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, getRouterName, inspectRoutes
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/uses color/handler utilities
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for displaying routes with method and handler name, supports colorization and verbose listing.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/uses html utilities
+- Safe summary: HTML helper providing raw() pass-through and html() template string helper with auto-escaping for HTML special characters.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: index (module export)
+- Reads as: (self exports)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: Server Side Generation helper entry point re-exporting SSG, utils, and middleware.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: SSG (class), generateManifest, getPaths
+- Reads as: ../../utils/url, ../../utils/filepath, ./utils.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/uses url/filepath utilities, ./helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG class for generating and serving static HTML, includes generateManifest, getPaths, and handle functions.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: handle, generateManifest, getPaths, getHtmlString
+- Reads as: ./index.ts, ../../utils/url, ../../utils/filepath
+- Neighbor files: ./helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/utils/uses url/filepath utilities
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for request handling, manifest generation, path calculation, and HTML string creation.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgMiddleware
+- Reads as: ./index.ts, ../../config, ../../middleware/storage/filesystem, ./utils.ts
+- Neighbor files: ./helper/ssg/index.ts, src/config, src/middleware/uses storage/filesystem, ./helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for caching generated HTML responses based on path hash and revalidation logic.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: index (module export)
+- Reads as: (self exports)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper entry point re-exporting StreamHandler, SSE, and Text streaming helpers.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamHandler
+- Reads as: ../../utils/body, ../../utils/response, ../../stream/web
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/uses body/response utilities, src/stream/
+- Safe summary: Stream handler helper with chunked response streaming support.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main export
